---
title: "Task 1: Geocoding Office Data"
subtitle: "Whole US Implementation"
author: 
  - name: "William Clinton Co"
    email: "clinton.will.c@gmail.com"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
abstract: |

format:
  pdf:
    fig-pos: "H"
    documentclass: article
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{float}
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
---


# This Week's Progress

look into shape files
look into HUD crosswalk match zipcode to censustrat


# Appendix {.appendix}

Link to code repository:

- https://github.com/WilliamClintC/Geocoding_Office
